TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-frog-story-shi

S.FORM: uvo na maica ci ha'o ucia paehohamo ta mo maica.
S.TRANSL: 他們竟然要我講故事。
Unexpectedly, (they) want me to tell a story.

S.FORM: ehng te'o n'a ahtu n'a ehohamo maitan'e.
S.TRANSL: 我今天難得來講故事。
Rarely, I will tell a story today.

S.FORM: ehng moso la cihi ci oko ho mo con ci av'u moso la aʉ aʉt'ʉcʉ to aʉt'ʉcʉ to mo conci fok'unge yon ta'e meihua te'o engha te ake'i ʉmnʉ ci yaei.
S.TRANSL: 一個男孩和一隻狗養了一隻青蛙。梅花，我稍微比較好講話。
A boy and a dog raised a frog. Meihua, I'm somewhat easily moved (to tell a story).

S.FORM: i'o mo con ci oko ho i'o mo eh ieh mo maezo aʉt'ʉcʉ ta mo con coni ci av'u.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩養了一隻狗。
A boy raised a dog.

S.FORM: ehm ah mo moso la noepohʉa 'e av'u ho oko moso la aʉt'ʉcʉ to fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩和狗一起養了一隻青蛙。
The boy and the dog raised a frog together.

S.FORM: Xmoso alʉhiX moh cu noana'o feungna noana'o feungna ne moso la oengʉtʉ manci s'a.
S.TRANSL: 一天晚上，已經很晚了，（人們）都睡了。
One night, it was very late when (people) had slept.

S.FORM: ohe la 'so teapha to pania to mo.
S.TRANSL: (他)怎麼會把（青蛙）放進去瓶子裡。
Why (did he) put (the frog) in a container?

S.FORM: to mo c'o okosi ongayo to mo isi.
S.TRANSL: 瓶口就只有這麼小而已。
The bottle neck is so small.

S.FORM: temza peelʉi enca hu eh te av'an av'a no kokugo.
S.TRANSL: (那個)用國語怎麼說?
How do (people) say that in Mandarin?

S.FORM: av'a no cou 'e sin 'e pania.
S.TRANSL: 用鄒語怎麼講那個瓶子是...
How do (people) describe the bottle in Tsou?

S.FORM: uN isi peelʉi hupaezuma ci pania.
S.TRANSL: 那個瓶子是可以看穿的瓶子。
The bottle is the bottle which can be seen through.

S.FORM: eh moh cu oengʉtʉ ne moso noana'o feʉngna oengʉtʉ ne moso noana'o feʉngna manci moh cu 'so maezo oengʉtʉ si av'u i'o av'u ci ihe aʉt'ʉca isi aʉt'ʉca ta oko ci av'u.
S.TRANSL: 一天晚上，夜已經很深了，男孩睡了，狗也跟著睡了。就是小孩子所養的狗。
One evening, (the boy) went to sleep. The dog went to bed with him-- the dog which he raises.

S.FORM: manci s'a yuyafo 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 那青蛙怎麼會跑出來?
Why did the frog come out?

S.FORM: moh cu pkaako mi to ngayo to pania 'o 'o fo'kunge ho pkaako.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙已經從瓶口跑掉了。
The frog had escaped from the mouth of the container.

S.FORM: ohe cu 'so mi cu 'so yʉc'ʉ 'e oko.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩起來了。
The child rose.

S.FORM: ihe cu isi cu ake'a isi cu cohivi ho mo pkaako av'u i'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們就稍微... 他已經知道狗....(不，是)青蛙跑掉了。
And they just somewhat ... He knew that dog, (no, it's) the frog escaped.

S.FORM: mi cu maezo nac'o si av'usi isi 'so aiti 'o fo'kunge mi cu uk'a na 'a lasi no 'so na.
S.TRANSL: 小狗覺得很難過因為青蛙逃走了。
The dog felt very sad, because it saw the frog escaped.

S.FORM: na'na ʉmnʉa ta av'u 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 狗也很喜歡那隻青蛙。
The dog also liked the frog very much.

S.FORM: mi cu nac'o i cu i'poepoha i'eima ta oko ho ta av'u 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 小狗很難過，就跟小孩一起找青蛙。
It felt very sad, and went to look for the frog together with the boy.

S.FORM: ta'una'na moso yon ta pania.
S.TRANSL: 狗心想青蛙本來在瓶子裡。
The dog thought that (the) from stayed in the bottle.

S.FORM: isi cu 'so payuoyo ta pania ta av'u 'o fnguusi.
S.TRANSL: 狗把頭伸進去瓶子裡。
The dog made its head enter into the container.

S.FORM: isi fnguusi ho eainca te'o n'a a'ʉmta ala esansana mio nana aʉmtʉ alʉ pkaako ta pania.
S.TRANSL: 狗想說我想要確定的找一下它是不是真的從瓶子裡跑掉。
The dog thought that I have to make sure and find whether it was really gone.

S.FORM: isi cu 'so hooyoeveni ta yoni to fo'ku yoni to fo'kunge 'e 'o fnguu to av'u manci 'so cʉnghʉ.
S.TRANSL: 狗把頭伸入(原來)青蛙在的(瓶子)裡，沒想到頭卡住了。
The dog inserted it head into (the container) where the frog (used to) stay.

S.FORM: cu o'tena peelʉi le o'tena peelʉi empuisi ta fnguu ta sʉngʉsi yon eh i'o ngayo to pania msi isi cu c'o asʉngʉca haahafa si.
S.TRANSL: 狗沒有辦法把在瓶頸的頭從瓶口拉出來。
The dog can't take pull its head at the neck of the bottle from the mouth of the bottle.

S.FORM: i'o osi yoni to fo'kunge ci pania.
S.TRANSL: 牠就隨身帶著青蛙住的那個瓶子。
It just always carried the bottle where the frog lived.

S.FORM: mi cu cʉng casngʉcʉ cʉnghʉ ta fnguu ta av'u si pania ho.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子一直卡在狗的頭。
The dog got its head stuck in the container.

S.FORM: ho mo yuyuso si si oko ho 'i'ima 'o ohe payoa ci fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 小狗和小孩一起找青蛙。
The dog looked for the lost frog together with the boy.

S.FORM: ohe la aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge na'no ma'na'nac'o ho mimimio to fʉengu ho bibimi mimimio to fʉengu ho 'i'ima 'o ohe la aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: (他們想到青蛙)心裡很難過,就在山裡走一走一起尋找他們以前養的青蛙。
They went to look for their pet frog in the mountains. They were very distressed (when they thought of their frog.)

S.FORM: 'iama mi cu aʉlʉ uh to mo aʉlʉ aʉlʉ 'e'evi.
S.TRANSL: (他們)走到一個都是樹(的地方)。
(They) went to (a place) full of trees.

S.FORM: manci pan to ihe teolʉi ci mo tmiehi to to evi ci zou cuma.
S.TRANSL: 他們竟然看到有一個東西吊在樹上。是什麼東西?
They unexpectedly saw (something) hanging on the tree. What is that?

S.FORM: ci cu taot'ova ta taot'ova ta av' to av'u 'o 'o evi manci 'so supeohʉ 'iama WHisi cuWH tapeoha 'o ceoyu mi cu meobango ta av'u meobango to av'u 'o ceoyu.
S.TRANSL: 蜂追著狗。
The bees chased the dog.

S.FORM: 'a mo no ne mio 'o oko isi yaeza aiti 'o pan to isi ai aiti ci fo ci feongo.
S.TRANSL: 此時，小孩也看到..他看到一個洞。
At that time, the child also saw.... He saw a hole.

S.FORM: i ta'una mo s'a noaemonʉ to feongo f i'o fo'kunge 'iama buhci 'o mo smoyafo.
S.TRANSL: 他以為青蛙在裡面，原來跑出來的是老鼠。
He thought that the frog was inside the hole. Unexpectedly, it is a mouse that appeared from the hole.

S.FORM: isi cu tapeoha to av'u 'o ceoyu mi cu maezo smoyafo 'o buhci ho maezo toekameosʉ mi cu cocapo to evi 'o.
S.TRANSL: 狗把蜂窩搖下來，老鼠也衝出來，也跑掉。
The dog has shaken down the bee hive. The mouse also moved out and escaped.

S.FORM: i'e oko ho mainca te totoefʉngʉ pan to isi isi enca te totoefʉngʉ pan to isi yaeza aiti to evi ci feongo.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子也爬到樹上想要躲。他躲藏起來，也看到一個樹洞。
The boy climbed the tree to hide (from something). He hided, and saw a tree hole.

S.FORM: isi cu aeza teʉ'tʉmi mo nana noaemonʉ na 'o 'o fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 他也尋找看看青蛙有沒有在洞裡面。
He also looked for the frog; see if it was in the tree hole.

S.FORM: eheN nemio mi cu toekameosʉ si av'u 'iama isi peobanga ta casngʉca peo peteokukuyungva ta ceoyu.
S.TRANSL: 那時候狗也跑掉，原來他一直被蜜蜂追著跑。
At that time, the dog also escaped, because the bees kept chasing it.

M.TRANSL: 被追得跑過來跑過去.受焦

S.FORM: cu smoyo 'e oko.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子很害怕。
The child was afraid.

S.FORM: tiisi'hi to evi ho supeohʉ man.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抓住樹枝的手鬆掉，掉了下來。
The hands holding the tree branch got loosen and the child fell.

S.FORM: nemio mi cu toesos'o 'o puku ho meiavovei.
S.TRANSL: 那時候貓頭鷹飛來飛去。
The owl flew everywhere.

S.FORM: isi n'a asngʉca 'i'eima ta oko 'o fo'kunge mi cu cocapo to evi ho mici tieo'pʉ to.
S.TRANSL: 小孩還是一直找青蛙，他爬上一棵樹，想要抓住樹枝。
The boy kept looking for the frog. He climbed up a tree and wanted to grab a tree branch.

S.FORM: mathʉthʉcʉ to mo eon to.
S.TRANSL: 在...樹的樹頭...。
the tree log at...

S.FORM: eN ma'e'evi 'o oko no.
S.TRANSL: 小的...的一些樹。
many trees, which is small on,...

S.FORM: isi o'te yu'ia 'o isi enca thʉcʉ.
S.TRANSL: 他沒仔細看他以為是樹枝的東西。
He didn't see clearly about what he thought as tree branches.

S.FORM: 'iama sungu no 'ua.
S.TRANSL: 原來是鹿的角。
Unexpectedly, it was the antler of a deer.

S.FORM: 'iama sungu no 'ua mi cu 'so yu mi cu bochio 'o 'ua isi cu 'so.
S.TRANSL: 原來是鹿的角，因此就... 他因此就知道那是鹿。
Unexpectedly, it was the antler of a deer. Therefore... Then he knew it's a deer.

S.FORM: mi cu yʉc'ʉ 'o 'ua manci 'so au'la oc'ocic'o ngoevi ta 'ua mi cu c'o.
S.TRANSL: 鹿起身，怎麼就那麼剛好小孩就被鹿揹著。
The deer rose and somehow it just coincidently shouldered the child.

S.FORM: mʉfkʉe to sungu to 'ua 'e oko ho.
S.TRANSL: 小孩就只能這樣在掛在鹿的角上。
The boy was just hanging on to the deer's antlers.

S.FORM: isi cu hafa ta 'ua ho smo'unu maica isi cu a'la t'ngisi ta av'u isi cu aiti isi hafa ta 'ua 'e.
S.TRANSL: 狗甚至為這件事哭泣（因為）狗看到小孩在被鹿帶著跑。
The dog even cried for this, (because) it saw the child was carried by the deer.

S.FORM: i'e oko lasi 'so na'na ʉmnʉa ta av'u 'e i'e la i'e oko.
S.TRANSL: 狗非常喜歡這個小孩子。
The dog liked this child very much.

S.FORM: isi cu hafa ta 'u 'ua mo smo'unu mainca maica.
S.TRANSL: 鹿就帶著小孩就這樣跑。
The deer just carried (the child) and run to somewhere.

S.FORM: 'iama tesi hafa uh to mo to mo tʉ'nʉ ho.
S.TRANSL: 原來鹿要帶小孩到懸崖。
Unexpectedly, the deer just took them running toward the cliff.

S.FORM: cu supeohʉ 'e oko maezo supeohʉ si av'u 'a moso na'no smomacongo.
S.TRANSL: 然後小孩子掉下來，那隻狗也跟著掉下來，因為(牠)跑得很快。
And then, the child fell. The dog also fell. It is because it ran too fast.

S.FORM: ho 'iama te su' to mo fozu ci chumu.
S.TRANSL: 原來他們掉到很深的水池。
Unexpectedly, they fell into deep water.

S.FORM: ma mo na'no eo'ngʉngʉ 'o isi su'si.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉下去的地方水很深。
The dog and the child fell into very deep water.

S.FORM: abohtʉ o'a mo alolongʉ mo aepohʉ su' to chumu 'e av'u ho oko.
S.TRANSL: 幸好他們都沒有受傷，他們兩個都掉進水裡。
Luckily they were not injured. Both of them fell into the water.

S.FORM: mi cu yon to chumu ho.
S.TRANSL: 他們就在水那邊。
They just stay there.

S.FORM: 'iama panto ihe aiti ci mo oko no evi ci mo ci mo measkoskopʉ to chumu ho eainca.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見有小樹漂浮在水面上，（他們）心裡想說。
They saw there was a small tree log floating on the water. And they thought,

S.FORM: s'a mo s'a yon ta noaemonʉ ta evi na 'o 'o ito 'i'ima ci fo'kunge isi cu eainca 'o mi'unu ta av'u ho eainca o'te ptaʉngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 是不是他們在找的青蛙就在樹裡面。男孩告訴狗不要吵。
whether the frog they are looking for was inside the tree. The boy told his dog not to be noisy.

S.FORM: cu i'eima isi cu bumemeala i'eima.
S.TRANSL: (他們)就仔細的找青蛙。
(They) just looked for (the frog) very carefully.

S.FORM: 'ia manci manci s'a eelʉ to mo yuso ci meoi no fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼會找到兩隻很大的青蛙。
Surprisingly they saw two big frogs.

S.FORM: cu a'ʉmtʉ na'no yamci ho eainca.
S.TRANSL: 他就非常驚訝的說。
(He) was very surprised and said,

S.FORM: 'iama mo 'iama mo yon tan'e lato i'e i'e la aka 'i'eima ci fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 原來我們一直在尋找的青蛙在這裡。
The frog which we kept looking for was here.

S.FORM: cu 'so angu angu na'no aveoveoyu na'no aveoveoyu.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩很高興。
The boy was very glad.

S.FORM: isi isi cu aiti manci s'a na'no man'i 'e fo'kunge cu i.
S.TRANSL: 他看... 怎麼青蛙那麼多。
He saw.. Why there were so many frog?

S.FORM: cu a manci s'a yuso 'e mo e 'e mo meoi no fo'kunge ho alʉ enepio 'e mo 'o'oko no fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼會有兩隻大的青蛙，還有竟然...有那麼多小的青蛙。
Why there were two big frogs, and unexpectedly... (there were) so many small frogs.

S.FORM: 'a isi cu isi cu m mi cu 'so angu kaebʉ mi cu mitachumu ho.
S.TRANSL: 因為他太高興，就走過水。
Since he was so glad as to walk across the water and,

S.FORM: tehe cu 'usa 'e 'o'oko no fo'kunge mo bitoyange to evi ho.
S.TRANSL: 就要走到有很多小青蛙的地方，（那些小青蛙）整排的站著。
(He would) go to the place with many small frogs. (These frogs) were sitting in line.

S.FORM: ho i'e 'e nan eh asonʉ mo meoi no fo'kunge asonʉ inosi ho amosi ta 'o'oko no fo'kunge.
S.TRANSL: 或許這兩隻大的青蛙是小的青蛙的爸爸和媽媽。
Maybe the two big frogs were the parents of the small frogs.

S.FORM: mi cu angu kaebʉ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩太過興奮。
The child was too happy.

S.FORM: manci s'a meelʉ aomotʉ'ʉ 'e i.
S.TRANSL: 奇怪，青蛙怎麼會說?
Why would the frog say,

S.FORM: 'e fo'kunge isi mi'uni 'e oko ho eainca.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙對著小孩子說。
The frog spoke to the child.

S.FORM: moso mongoi aa'mi isi eainca.
S.TRANSL: 牠離開我們這裡。
It had left our place.

S.FORM: eh mo na'no nac'o ho ac'o anova c'o sia to pania ko'ko mo pkaako mo angu nac'o.
S.TRANSL: 牠很難過，因為你們竟然只有把牠放在瓶子裡，因此牠才跑掉了。
It was distressed, since you just put it in the bottle. Therefore it left.

S.FORM: eh c'o o'te bumemeala aʉt'ʉca anova c'o sia to pania.
S.TRANSL: (他們)沒有好好的飼養，只把他放在瓶子裡。
(They) didn't raise it carefully; they just put it in the container.

S.FORM: 'a la'u 'a la no 'a la i 'a la 'a la'u no yon to chumu ho yuhnguzu manci anova c'o sia ta pania.
S.TRANSL: 我平常是在水中游泳的，怎麼把我放在瓶子裡面。
I usually swan in the water. Why was I put in a bottle?

S.FORM: na'no sʉ'no 'e oko ho isi na'no sʉ'no 'e oko ho isi ho isi eainca ta fo'kunge isi cu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子很生氣，因為青蛙這樣對他講。
The boy was very angry, since the frog said such words to him.

S.FORM: ea 'o mo yon to chumu ci n'a oko no fo'kunge tesi tokʉneni.
S.TRANSL: 他拿起在水面上的一個小青蛙，朝著那隻青蛙丟過去。
He took a small frog in the water and tossed it to the frog.

S.FORM: eh mo c'o maica 'e 'e os'o engha mi'o nana 'so emio.
S.TRANSL: 我說到這裡，不知道說得對不對。
This is my saying. I'm not sure whether it is correct.
